programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
37/52. Tha MacÌomhair a' saoilsinn gum bi e na dheagh ghàirnealair ach tha e cho ceàrr sa ghabhas! MacÌomhair thinks that he will be a great gardener, but that is very much not the case!
17/52. Tha Posy na Rìgh an-diugh 's tha i a' toirt òrduighean seachad. Posy is the king today and she is giving orders.
18/52. Nuair a tha Pip a' sealltainn dha Posy gu bheil e math air spèileadh, chan eil i toilichte. When Pip shows Posy how good he is at roller skating, she's not happy.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 34/52. It's a sweltering day, much too hot to do anything apart from eat ice cream and swim.
18/26. Tha Daolag-bhreac is Seillean a' cunntadh chasan an-diugh. Ladybird and Bee are counting legs today.
5/26. The mice are preparing for their annual ball, which Célestine has been invited to for the first time.
40/80. Mòrag Anna NicNèill a' leughadh An Oidhche Mhìorbhaileach aig Bèibidh Broc. Morag Ann MacNeil reads An Oidhche Mhìorbhaileach aig Bèibidh Broc.
2/12. Tha Daniel a' farpais an aghaidh preasantairean CBBC ALBA ach saoil cò shoirbhicheas? Daniel competes against the CBBC ALBA presenters, but who will emerge victorious?
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 1/26. The Spuds take the camper van on holiday and end up at the bottom of the sea.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 2/26. Tha Pòl a' sàbhaladh aiseal a th' ann an cunnart shìos aig na docaichean. Dave rescues an endangered donkey from the docks.
2/8. Tha rudan inntinneach aig an Speuradair Bekah ri innse dhuinn mun ghealaich. Astronaut Bekah shares some interesting facts about the moon.
12/13. Tha turas campaidh gus bhith ann is tha Hilda is Flòraidh a'  cur aithne air caraidean ùra. A camping trip is going to take place, and Hilda and Flòraidh make new acquaintances.
6/6. The story of golf at Askernish in South Uist and professional coach Keil Beveridge gives us his weekly top playing tip.
13/13. Liam Alastair Crouse from the United States chats to Joy in the studio and Calum Maclean takes a boat trip to a colony of seabirds full of character.

8/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.

programmes.show_name: Angus Og: The Making of a Tabloid Teuchter
programmes.show_description: The story behind artist Ewen Bain's beloved Hebridean cartoon rascal. An sgeulachd air cùlaibh a' mheabain eileanach chartùn a chruthaich Eòghann Bain.
Tha am prògram seo a' rannsachadh ìomhaigh bhodhaig agus na tha e a' ciallachadh dha measgachadh de dhaoine. Exploring body image and what it means to different people.
1/6. Join Angus Mackay as he prepares and launches his small boat for a summer's fishing off the Isle of Lewis.
6/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
4/20. There's an emergency situation at the hospital, but are the doctors taking a calculated risk?
3/9. Prògram spioradail le laoidhean, sailm agus leughaidhean. Amongst the singers performing are Emma MacLeod, Hamish Scott, and Rona MacLeod with Duncan MacLeod.

programmes.show_name: 'S E Iasg a Th'Annam (I'm a Fish)
programmes.show_description: 6/52. Tha an t-Iasg-leòmhainn ag innse dhuinn mar a tha 'ad os cionn nan cuantan. The Lionfish tells us how they are the boss of the ocean.
41/80. Pàdruig Morrison reads Dotag anns an t-Sneachda, written by Corrinne Averiss and illustrated by Fiona Woodcock.
6/9. At four months old, conjoined twins Hussan and Hussein underwent an operation to separate them. Now they take up a climbing challenge.
1/52. Tha Belle is Sebastian a' dol air cuairt-dànachd gus an dràgon geal a lorg. Belle and Sebastian go on an adventure to find the white dragon.
14/20. Never meet your Heroes. The Farmers Rock 'n' Roll idol is stranded at the farm when his limousine breaks down. Soon revealed as a spoilt pretender, Shaun decides to show him a lesson.
2/8. Tha Calum air bòrd an MV Hallaig, bàta-aiseig hybrid a tha siubhal eadar Sgonnsair agus Ratharsair. Calum is on the MV Hallaig, a hybrid ferry sailing between Sconser and Raasay.

26/26. Marcel Gurillo from Valencia in Spain chats to Joy in the studio, and Calum Maclean visits a poignant location.

programmes.show_name: Immigration Tracks - Canada, le Anne NicAilpein
programmes.show_description: 2/7. The journey continues to Nova Scotia via a vineyard on the edge of the Bras d'Or Lake.

programmes.show_name: Miorbhail na Monach - Secrets in the Peat
programmes.show_description: 3/3. Anne McAlpine learns how peatlands are an amazing carbon store. Tha Anne NicAlpein ag ionnsachadh mar a tha mòintichean nan stòran mòra de chàrboin.
